meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Design With AI: A Freelancer’s Guide to No-Code Development
content.seo_description: Overcome no coding experience by using AI to build professional apps. This intermediate checklist covers Antigravity and Claude Code workflows for freelancers.
content.answer_block: Stop letting a lack of coding experience stall your freelance business. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid UI prototyping and Claude Code for backend logic, you can ship production-grade applications in hours. This workflow bridges the gap between design vision and functional software, allowing you to deliver high-value assets to clients instantly.
content.intro:
The client meeting just ended. You sold a vision, a beautiful interface, and a seamless user experience. But as the door closes, the crushing weight of reality hits: you don’t write code. The gap between your design prowess and the technical execution is the single greatest bottleneck in your freelance career, often forcing you to settle for low-margin work or expensive developer dependencies.

It is time to stop apologizing for your lack of syntax knowledge. We are entering the era of the AI-augmented builder, where your design intent is the only currency that matters. By orchestrating Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform from a designer into a full-stack architect, turning prompts into functional, scalable applications that command premium rates.

steps.title: Architecting the UI with Antigravity
steps.description: Define the layout and design system without touching CSS. Use Antigravity to generate high-fidelity, responsive layouts that serve as the structural backbone of your application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive, modern SaaS dashboard layout with a sidebar navigation, a top header with user profile, and a main content area using Tailwind CSS. Focus on a clean, minimalist aesthetic suitable for enterprise clients.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate component structure based on the Antigravity export'

steps.title: Mapping Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Transition your static design into a dynamic application by feeding your UI specs into Claude Code. This establishes the business logic and state management requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the dashboard UI and identify the necessary state variables for a user authentication flow and data fetching from a REST API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'implement user state and API integration logic in the dashboard component'

steps.title: Automating API Integration
steps.description: Connect your frontend to backend services using AI-assisted API implementation. This removes the manual toil of configuring endpoints and handling JSON responses.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust API service module in TypeScript that handles GET/POST requests, includes error handling, and implements loading states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create api.ts service with error handling for all dashboard endpoints'

steps.title: Rigorous Debugging and Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code’s iterative loop to stress-test your application. Focus on edge cases like empty states, API timeouts, and network failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for potential runtime errors and suggest improvements for better performance and type safety.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'run full suite of integration tests and identify potential UI race conditions'

steps.title: Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Finalize your build for production. Generate clear technical documentation so the client can maintain the app without needing you to hold their hand.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a README.md file that explains the architecture, how to configure environment variables, and how to deploy the application to Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate professional documentation and deployment checklist for this project'

pro_tips: Always use the 'Explain' flag in Claude Code to understand the logic; this builds your internal knowledge base for future projects.
Utilize Antigravity’s component library as a base to maintain design consistency across multiple client projects.
Structure your prompts by defining constraints first; AI performs better when it knows exactly what it cannot do.
Keep your repository modular; use Claude Code to refactor large files into smaller, manageable components every three steps.
Treat your AI interactions like a pair-programming session—provide context about the business goal, not just the technical requirement.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, iterate by adding a database layer such as Supabase to handle persistent user data and complex queries.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap. Stop waiting for the perfect moment to build your technical empire; the AI stack is ready to do the heavy lifting for you. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
